scripts.deploy: powershell -Command "Remove-Item -Force deploy.zip -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; npm run build; Push-Location dist; npm install --omit=dev; Pop-Location; Compress-Archive -Path dist\* -DestinationPath deploy.zip -Force"
scripts.deploy-mac: rm -f deploy.zip && npm run build && cd dist && npm install --omit=dev && find . -name "*.map" -delete && zip -r ../deploy.zip .
